query.description: Temporal visibility query against the standalone-activity visibility, e.g. "ActivityType = 'MyActivity' AND Status = 'Running'".

reason.description: Reason attached to the activity cancellation event. Useful for the activity worker's cancellation handler and audit history.

limit.description: Maximum number of activity executions the visibility query returns. Mirrors the server-side PageSize parameter.

concurrency.description: Number of concurrent cancel requests. Capped at 100.
